name: Impact of an online-guided physical activity intervention on cognition, resting-state brain connectivity, and the gut microbiome in healthy older adults-a randomized controlled trial.
short_name: Online physical activity older-adult microbiome RCT
summary: A 2026 single-blinded randomized controlled trial of an 8-week online-guided multicomponent physical activity intervention in 92 healthy older adults, including cognition, brain connectivity, fitness, and gut microbiome endpoints.
